data.title: Vysarn Limited Schedules Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Vysarn Ltd (AU:VYS) has released an update.

Vysarn Limited has announced its Annual General Meeting scheduled for November 21, 2024, at the South of Perth Yacht Club. Key items on the agenda include the consideration of the company’s Annual Report and the re-election of director Mr. Sheldon Burt. Shareholders eligible as of November 19, 2024, are invited to participate and vote on these matters.

For further insights into AU:VYS stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Beijing Chunlizhengda Announces Semi-Annual Dividend Details
data.description:
Beijing Chunlizhengda Medical Instruments Co., Ltd. Class H (HK:1858) has released an update.

Beijing Chunlizhengda Medical Instruments Co., Ltd. has announced a semi-annual interim cash dividend of RMB 0.83 per 10 shares for the financial year ending December 2024, with the payment set for December 13, 2024. The dividend will be distributed to shareholders in Hong Kong dollars, with varying tax rates applied based on residency and investment channels.

data.title: N1 Holdings Director Increases Stake in Company
data.description:
N1 Holdings Ltd. (AU:N1H) has released an update.

N1 Holdings Ltd. announced a change in director Ren Hor Wong’s interest in the company’s securities, with an acquisition of 10,000 fully paid ordinary shares at $0.125 per share, bringing his total to 339,688 shares. This on-market trade reflects a strategic move by the director, potentially signaling confidence in the company’s future prospects.

data.title: Standard Chartered Adopts New Benchmark for Dividends
data.description:
Standard Chartered (GB:STAN) has released an update.

Standard Chartered PLC has received a favorable court ruling that allows it to adopt an alternative benchmark rate for calculating dividends on its 6.409% non-cumulative redeemable preference shares. Following the cessation of the USD LIBOR, dividends will now be calculated using the three-month CME Term SOFR plus a credit adjustment spread. This decision provides clarity and assurance to investors regarding future dividend calculations.

For further insights into GB:STAN stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks HongKong Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Lykos Metals Reports High-Grade Finds in Bosnia Projects
data.description:
Lykos Metals Limited (AU:LYK) has released an update.

Lykos Metals Limited has reported promising results from recent rock-chip sampling at its Sinjakovo Project in Bosnia-Herzegovina, with high-grade finds including up to 1.8% antimony, 4.0% copper, and 969 g/t silver. The company is advancing its exploration efforts by applying for amendments to allow drilling at priority locations and commencing surface sampling at its Doboj tenement in the Sockovac Project. These developments signal potential value for investors interested in battery, base, and precious metals markets.

For further insights into AU:LYK stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks Australian Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Enechange Ltd. Sees Surge in EV Charging Use
data.description:
Enechange Ltd. (JP:4169) has released an update.

Enechange Ltd. reported a notable increase in the use of its public EV charging ports during Q3 2024, driven by a successful ‘Summer Outing Campaign’ and higher user recognition of charging stations. The total energy dispensed rose by 28.4%, and the average monthly charging time per port increased by 16.5% compared to the previous quarter.

data.title: Clinuvel Pharmaceuticals Reports Key AGM Resolutions
data.description:
Clinuvel Pharmaceuticals Limited (AU:CUV) has released an update.

Clinuvel Pharmaceuticals Limited announced the results of their Annual General Meeting, revealing key resolutions on director elections and remuneration. Notably, the resolution for the adoption of the Remuneration Report faced significant opposition, marking a second strike under corporate regulations. Investors and stakeholders may find these developments influential in assessing the company’s governance and strategy.
